items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution expiry window support.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Attribution expiry window support' but did not provide any concrete evidence or data to confirm or deny its fulfillment. The linked use case outlines the need for this support, yet the evidence presented lacks specific details regarding the implementation or checks related to the expiry window. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
